title: 仲間集結！プリンセスなら優雅たれ！

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ritto Dorm residents and members of the
disciplinary committee! Thank you for gathering
here today.

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Resident A
text_block_list.text:
There have been reports of a ghost popping up
around the dorm. And we're gonna hunt it down!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Roger that! We've got the whole disciplinary
committee here to protect the peace!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
According to King, the ghost has been growing
increasingly unruly recently. We need to take it
out and put everyone's mind at ease as soon as
possible!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Resident A
text_block_list.text:
That strange light appeared right about... here.
Gyah! That's it! That's the light! Gh-gh-gh-ghost!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, not so fast. That's no ghost. It's just the
light from someone's flashli—

text_block_list.name: Gallant Disciplinary Committee Member
text_block_list.text: What?! Ghost?! Over there! Halt!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huuuh?! No! That's not a— Hey! Hold on!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Resident B
text_block_list.text:
I've got i—ouch!
Hey, don't burst in out of nowhere like that! I
nearly had it!

text_block_list.name: Brave Disciplinary Committee Member
text_block_list.text:
You're one to talk! You knocked me flat on my
butt! Ow...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You're both at fault! You ought to know better
than to just barrel around a corner like that! It's
against the rules!

text_block_list.name: Loud Disciplinary Committee Member
text_block_list.text:
Yeowch! Who did that?! Someone caught me in a
bug net!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Resident C
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, sorry about that! I thought you were the
ghost!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: This isn't going very well...

text_block_list.name: Ghost Hunting Party
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Everyone's exhausted and all over the place...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well... Just chasing after anything that looks like
it might be a ghost is pretty taxing.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
If this is how it's going to be, then... I know what I
have to do!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami?! Don't tell me you're planning to keep
chasing it all on your own!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Get a hold of yourself! A solo assault is too dangerous! If you bust another hole in the wa—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: We're throwing a tea party!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo & Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm grabbing a snack during my break when I spot
Kawakami Princess and her friends.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You can't fight if you're tired! And you can't fight
on an empty stomach either!

text_block_list.name: Gallant Disciplinary Committee Member
text_block_list.text: ...And that's why we're having a tea party?

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Resident A
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's kinda perfect timing. Running around
nonstop is thirsty work.

text_block_list.name: Gallant Disciplinary Committee Member
text_block_list.text:
Fair enough... Maybe it would've gone better if
we had scheduled breaks.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ohhhh, I know! Let's try hunting in shifts from now
on! Any other ideas?

text_block_list.name: Brave Disciplinary Committee Member
text_block_list.text:
Well, we did crash into each other as we chased
after the ghost in the hallway... It'd probably be
smart if we worked out some kind of signal for
next time.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And here I was wondering why she wanted to hold
a tea party...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: She wanted to hold a strategy meeting! It's nice having everyone on the same page!
